description: Canonical capability coverage matrix for the CommonAIExport Unreal automation surface. Contract checks require every native TCP command and every client-only MCP tool to appear exactly once.

capabilities.title: Connection, command discovery, and manifest export
capabilities.extension_policy: Extend this capability for protocol discovery, identity, and command metadata. Do not add parallel status probes without documenting the transport difference.

capabilities.title: Source control, logs, build, cook, and tests
capabilities.extension_policy: Add build/test/source-control workflow automation here unless the new behavior owns a different execution boundary.

capabilities.title: Project metadata, plugin state, and module discovery
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for project descriptor, plugin, and module operations. New project settings writes should prefer project_config_mutation.

capabilities.title: Config file read and write operations
capabilities.extension_policy: Extend this capability for structured .ini reads and writes. Keep path allowlists and section/key validation in the native layer.

capabilities.title: Asynchronous command execution and event streaming
capabilities.extension_policy: Add job lifecycle or queue observability here. Do not create one-off async variants for commands that can use task_submit.

capabilities.title: Blueprint and widget export
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for read-only Unreal asset export and supported-type discovery.

capabilities.title: External asset import
capabilities.extension_policy: Extend this capability for additional Unreal import factories that ingest files from disk.

capabilities.title: Runtime world and subsystem diagnostics
capabilities.extension_policy: Add read-only PIE/runtime diagnostics here. runtime_component_list owns actor component lists, scene details, and hierarchy inspection; mutating gameplay control should be a separate reviewed capability.

capabilities.title: Editor world metadata and console execution
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for editor-wide world state and explicit console command execution. Keep destructive scope gates for console execution.

capabilities.title: Editor actor discovery and mutation
capabilities.extension_policy: Extend this capability for level actor operations. Use dry-run support for destructive actor changes.

capabilities.title: Level open, save, and structure diagnostics
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for editor-loaded level package lifecycle and read-only level structure diagnostics, including streaming sublevels, World Partition, Data Layers, Level Instances, and HLOD. Runtime travel state stays under runtime_diagnostics.

capabilities.title: Play-in-editor lifecycle
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for PIE lifecycle control. Runtime inspection stays under runtime_diagnostics.

capabilities.title: Editor viewport screenshot capture
capabilities.extension_policy: Extend this capability for viewport capture variants and camera-aware editor screenshots.

capabilities.title: Widget Blueprint tree authoring
capabilities.extension_policy: Add UMG/CommonUI authoring operations here only after checking existing widget commands and the UI transfer component recipes.

capabilities.title: Widget Blueprint preview capture
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for design-time WBP preview capture and render warmup behavior.

capabilities.title: Class default object property access
capabilities.extension_policy: Extend this capability for CDO scalar/object property access. Array edits belong in cdo_array_access.

capabilities.title: Class default object array mutation
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for nested/array CDO edits and keep array length/readback validation paired with writes.

capabilities.title: Object access and reflected type discovery
capabilities.extension_policy: Add reflection-based discovery or object invocation here. Prefer typed high-level commands when the workflow is common enough.

capabilities.title: Blueprint graph node and pin editing
capabilities.extension_policy: Extend this capability for K2 graph editing. Check graph, variable, and reflection commands before adding new node helpers.

capabilities.title: Blueprint variable lifecycle
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for Blueprint member variables. Widget tree children are not Blueprint variables.

capabilities.title: Blueprint parent class changes
capabilities.extension_policy: Keep parent-class changes isolated here because they affect compile and asset compatibility.

capabilities.title: Actor Blueprint SimpleConstructionScript components
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for Actor Blueprint SCS component authoring. SCS mutation belongs in UAIBlueprintComponentBuilder rather than CommandHandlers. Runtime component inspection stays under runtime_diagnostics; Widget tree composition stays under widget_blueprint_authoring.

capabilities.title: Material graph, compile, and material instance automation
capabilities.extension_policy: Add material/MIC automation here. Prefer reflected object access only for uncommon fields that do not justify a material command.

capabilities.title: Data asset persistence
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for data asset save/persistence operations. Asset creation and generic asset fields belong in asset_authoring_registry.

capabilities.title: DataTable creation, rows, and CSV import
capabilities.extension_policy: Extend this capability for row-structured table operations and imports. DataTable asset creation, row mutation, and CSV import belong in UAIDataTableBuilder rather than CommandHandlers.

capabilities.title: Generic asset creation, property access, registry queries, and redirectors
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for generic asset lifecycle and registry work. Prefer specialized Widget, Material, DataTable, or Import capabilities for typed workflows.

capabilities.title: Asset reload and editor cache refresh
capabilities.extension_policy: Keep reload/cache-refresh operations here so authoring workflows can explicitly depend on them.

capabilities.title: StaticMesh asset diagnostics
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for typed StaticMesh asset inspection, including LODs, sections, material slots, sockets, BodySetup collision, bounds, memory estimates, and Nanite state. Generic asset registry and property access stay in asset_authoring_registry; mesh mutation/import/export workflows must be separately reviewed.

capabilities.title: SkeletalMesh asset diagnostics
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for typed SkeletalMesh asset inspection, including LODs, sections, material slots, sockets, skeleton references, physics asset bodies/constraints, bounds, memory estimates, morph counts, and Nanite state. Generic asset registry and property access stay in asset_authoring_registry; skeletal mesh import, retargeting, socket mutation, and animation authoring must be separately reviewed.

capabilities.title: Project input mapping settings
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for input settings mutations and discovery. General .ini edits stay under project_config_mutation.

capabilities.title: Animation Blueprint creation and inspection
capabilities.extension_policy: Extend this capability for animation Blueprint asset automation.

capabilities.title: Animation sequence and montage diagnostics
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for typed read-only AnimSequence and AnimMontage asset inspection, including timing, skeletons, notifies, curves, data model tracks, sync markers, montage slots, sections, and referenced animations. AnimBlueprint graph/state-machine work remains in anim_blueprints and blueprint_graph_editing; animation authoring, retargeting, root-motion baking, and notify mutation must be separately reviewed.

capabilities.title: LevelSequence and MovieScene inspection
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for Sequencer/LevelSequence asset introspection. Do not overlap with WidgetAnimation export or generic asset reflection when MovieScene bindings/tracks/sections are the workflow.

capabilities.title: Spline actor creation and point authoring
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for SplineComponent point-level inspection and editor authoring. Keep handler-owned until reusable spline domain logic justifies a builder; actor_spawn owns generic actor creation; runtime_component_list owns generic component summaries.

capabilities.title: Landscape proxy diagnostics and height sampling
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for ALandscapeProxy, LandscapeComponent, target layer, LandscapeSpline, and terrain height diagnostics. SplineComponent authoring stays in spline_authoring; generic actor/component summaries stay in editor_actor_operations/runtime_diagnostics.

capabilities.title: Foliage type diagnostics and instance sampling
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for AInstancedFoliageActor, UFoliageType, foliage settings, HISM component summaries, and bounded instance sampling diagnostics. Generic actor/component summaries stay in editor_actor_operations/runtime_diagnostics; foliage painting, erasure, or type mutation must be a separately reviewed mutating capability.

capabilities.title: PCG graph and component diagnostics
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for PCGGraph node/pin/edge semantics, PCG settings snapshots, and PCGComponent generation state. asset_search owns generic PCG asset discovery; runtime_component_list owns generic component summaries; PCG graph authoring, generation, cleanup, and mutation must be separately reviewed mutating capabilities.

capabilities.title: Niagara system, emitter, and script diagnostics
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for typed read-only NiagaraSystem, NiagaraEmitter, and NiagaraScript inspection, including exposed parameters, emitter handles, renderer summaries, script compile state, VM attributes, data interfaces, and bounded reflected renderer properties. Generic listing stays in asset_search; Niagara creation, spawning, parameter mutation, module editing, HLSL extraction, and scratch module authoring must be separately reviewed.

capabilities.title: MCP client multi-editor bridge
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for Python client orchestration across editor connections.

capabilities.title: Cross-project asset and code transfer workflows
capabilities.extension_policy: Extend this capability for client-side transfer planning, execution, and verification.

capabilities.title: MCP resources and prompt templates
capabilities.extension_policy: Use this capability for Python-hosted MCP resources and reusable prompts.

capabilities.title: Client guardrails, docs lookup, native probes, and metadata export
capabilities.extension_policy: Add client-only guardrails, documentation lookup, metadata export, or native endpoint probes here.
